approved.subject: Congratulations! GrantFlow AI — {{scholarshipName}} Award Decision
approved.body:
Dear {{applicantName}},

CONGRATULATIONS — you have been selected to receive the {{scholarshipName}}!

Award: {{awardAmount}} | Application ID: {{applicationId}}

Next Steps:
1. Reply to accept your offer
2. Submit enrollment verification
3. Provide bank details via {{onboardingLink}}

With congratulations,
GrantFlow AI Review Team
